mnemonics: Please Excuse My Dear Aunt Sally's Laws (PEMDAS-like for logic: P-Idempotent, E-Commutative, M-Associative, D-Distributive, A-Identity, S-Complement, L-De Morgan's)
keyPoints: Idempotent Laws: p ∨ p ≡ p, p ∧ p ≡ p
Absorption Laws: p ∨ (p ∧ q) ≡ p, p ∧ (p ∨ q) ≡ p
commonMistakes: Misapplying De Morgan's Laws by forgetting to flip ∧/∨ when negating
Assuming logical equivalence is the same as algebraic equality
Forgetting that the Domination Laws (p ∨ T ≡ T, p ∧ F ≡ F) override identity laws in certain cases
